prerequisites: A Lokalise account with admin role on the project you want to sync. An API token is only able to access projects where you have the admin role.
A Lokalise API token generated from your profile settings (used as the api_key secret).
The Lokalise project ID for the project you want to extract (used as the project_id config field).

authMethods.name: API token
authMethods.summary: Authenticate with a Lokalise API token supplied as the api_key field. Lokalise sends this token in the X-Api-Token request header on every API call. Generate the token from Profile settings > API tokens and choose a read-only or read/write type.

setupSteps.title: Generate a Lokalise API token
setupSteps.body: Sign in to Lokalise and click your team avatar in the bottom left. Open Profile settings, go to API tokens, and select Generate new token. Choose the token type (read-only is sufficient for extraction). Copy the token and store it securely.

setupSteps.title: Locate your project ID
setupSteps.body: Open the Lokalise project you want to sync and copy its project ID. The project ID identifies the specific project the connector reads from.

setupSteps.title: Configure the connector
setupSteps.body: Enter the generated token in the api_key field and the project identifier in the project_id field. Both fields are required.

setupSteps.title: Mind the API rate limits
setupSteps.body: Lokalise limits access to all endpoints to 6 requests per second per API token and per IP address, with at most 10 concurrent requests per project. Requests beyond these limits return HTTP 429.
